Scenario: Sales Rep clicks 'Ready For Acceptance' action on an Approved quote
Expected Result: Action button is visible in header or overflow menu; system runs RCA validations then opens the screen flow modal

Scenario: Screen flow launched by 'Ready For Acceptance' displays all mandatory document capture fields
Expected Result: Modal contains Primary Order Form (attachment), Order Form Not Required (checkbox), Primary Purchase Order (attachment), and Purchase Order Not Required (checkbox)

Scenario: Sales Rep checks Order Form Not Required = TRUE and Purchase Order Not Required = TRUE in the screen flow and finishes
Expected Result: Flow completes and Quote Execution Status field updates to 'Ready for Acceptance'

Scenario: 'Create Order' action is visible and enabled when Execution Status is 'Ready for Acceptance'; clicking it marks Execution Status 'Accepted' and creates an Order record
Expected Result: Create Order button present and enabled; after click Execution Status = 'Accepted' and an Order record is linked to the Quote
